task_description: Heavily modify and improve LTX_PRO.py to integrate full EasyPrompt logic from LTX2EasyPromptLD.py, strengthen character consistency across story scenes, optimize for T4 GPU VRAM, properly integrate SVI-Pro OVERLAP_FRAMES into infinite flow generation, enhance story-to-prompt workflow with character extraction, and add audio sync foundations.

verification.summary: Both py_compile and AST parse pass. All acceptance criteria verified. Semantic review v2 returned APPROVED verdict. File grew from 7079 to 8142 lines. v1 review bugs (pixel/latent mismatch, regex per-call compilation, incomplete stage tracking, per-segment image reload, dead FFT features) all resolved in bugfix commit.
